title: Poppin Duckies
description: it's a mod that lets you throw Rubber Duckies
body: TLDR it's a mod that lets you throw a rubber ducky, and you can also feed the rubber duckies poppin candy to make mobs explode. Or feed it Redstone or Glowstone Dust for other effects. we also have a villager that sells you lemonade used to craft poppin candy
